meaning: very large crude carrier (吨位在20万至30 万吨之间的)巨型油船 (=v.l.c.c.)
examples: CSR for Double Hull Oil Tankers, have many influences on the structural design of VLCC.
To master the maneuver technology of VLCC safety anchorage is the key to VLCC navigation safeguarding.
The future market of the 300,000t twin-skeg type VLCC with super breath and shallow draught is prospective.
Efficiency offers another timely benefit: after several years of sluggishness, the VLCC (Very Large Crude Carrier) repair market is on an upswing due to rebounding freight rates.
